phrases: Run when you can, walk if you have to, crawl if you must; just never give up.
The only bad run is the one that didn't happen.
No matter how slow you go, you are still lapping everyone on the couch.
Your mind is your strongest muscle.
Running is therapy that always works.
Forward is a pace.
Run the day, don't let it run you.
The miracle isn't that I finished; it's that I had the courage to start.
Every step is a gift.
Run with your heart, not just your legs.
Pain is temporary, but the pride of finishing lasts forever.
Don't stop when you're tired; stop when you're done.
An early morning walk is a blessing for the whole day.
Run often. Run long. But never outrun your joy of running.
Walking is man's best medicine.
If it doesn't challenge you, it won't change you.
The voice in your head that says you can't is a liar.
A short run is better than no run.
Run fast, run slow, run far, run close—just run.
Don't look back—you're not going that way.
Every mile is a new opportunity to learn something about yourself.
Step one to running: You run. There is no step two.
Jogging is the art of moving at a pace that looks like you're trying.
Let your run be the most relaxing part of your day.
Your body achieves what your mind believes.
minis: Run when you can, walk if you have to, crawl if you must; just never give up.
The only bad run is the one that didn't happen.
No matter how slow you go, you are still lapping everyone on the couch.
